title: Ultimate Zombie War!
description: In a unforgiving world you are the last man on earth after a zombie apocalypse survive and loot Welcome to hell
body:
Im trying To Aim for the perfect zombie/war modpack i Will try to Keep Updates flowing so i Can Share With you Guys                                                            

**About**.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             you must Rebuild civilization But watch out There Are Things in The World You Must Make guns To fight And Kill Good luck And stay safe 


**Why i Should download**.  
i Offer what other Modpacks Dont also Updated to 1.21.1.                 
i Use pmweather which is the Best Weather Mod out There.                  
i Installed superb warfare which is The Best War Mod out There.          

**features**.                                                             
Helicopters Planes Boats.                                                
Pmweather is The Best weather Mod Out there.                                    
Better Villages And Pillager Outposts.                                    
Better Islands.                                                             
seasons plants Have to Grow in Pacific seasons.                           
**And over 60+ MORE FEATURES**

 
**critical information**.                                                  
If a Zombie Attacks you Could get infected cure Golden apples.           
Slower on old systems.                                                   
Open to Lan crashs After Around 30 seconds.    
More Zombies The longer You play.
